title: apicra deltoidea
intro: Apicra deltoidea, also known as the "Desert Marigold", is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Apicra deltoidea include its ability to treat various skin conditions, such as acne, wounds, and minor cuts, due to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. Apicra deltoidea can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions or taken internally to promote overall well-being.
